approach: Sand to studs. Verify foundation before adding floors. Each layer proves itself.

checkpoints.name: System Reality Audit Complete
criteria: SRM created with all capabilities inventoried
All routes inventoried (80 total)
All UI screens mapped (10 screens)
All pipeline modules listed (17 stages)
Protocol registry documented (13 protocols)
Data sources cataloged (4 sources)
Test suite inventoried (38 unit + 3 e2e)
evidence: Route inventory: 80 endpoints across 10 router modules
Pipeline: 17-stage evaluation pipeline mapped with status
Protocol registry: 13 protocols (9 PRO, 4 ELITE) across 5 categories

checkpoints.name: UI Schematics + Integration Plumbing Laid Down
criteria: Every UI screen has a spec with layout zones, data contracts, and verification status
Every integration point between Marvin and BetApp is mapped
Build order defined: verify endpoints -> auth -> builder -> dashboard -> browse -> protocol
Anti-patterns documented (no more WORKING without proof)
Shared components identified (eval card, leg row, protocol badge, tier gate)
evidence: docs/designs/09-ui-schematics.md — 10 screen specs with data contracts
Verification checklist: 8 curl proofs required before any screen gets code

checkpoints.name: Endpoint Verification (Layer 0)
criteria: curl /health returns 200 with real data
curl /leading-light/evaluate/text returns full evaluation (not stub)
curl /api/auth/login returns JWT (not placeholder)
curl /api/bets/history returns real bet objects
curl /api/v1/odds/games — determine if ODDS_API_KEY is configured
curl /api/protocols — determine if registry loads
curl /api/notifications — determine if notification system works
Each endpoint stamped VERIFIED / PLACEHOLDER / MISSING
ui_contract_v1.py output shape documented
checkpoints.deliverable: Updated SRM with VERIFIED/PLACEHOLDER/MISSING stamps per endpoint
blockers: Need VPS access (Hostinger API token) to run curl proofs
checkpoints.gateRule: No UI screen work begins until its endpoints are VERIFIED

checkpoints.name: Pipeline Integrity Verified
criteria: /app/evaluate POST returns structured response matching ui_contract shape
Pipeline calls core evaluation (not placeholder)
Sherlock hook fires when enabled
DNA contract validator runs on every evaluation
Tier-based filtering applied (FREE sees less than PRO)
Response schema matches 09-ui-schematics.md Section 2.5 data contract
checkpoints.deliverable: Stable evaluation endpoint with verified response shape
checkpoints.gateRule: Builder screen (Layer 2) blocked until this passes

checkpoints.name: Auth + Landing (UI Layer 1)
criteria: Landing redirects authed->dashboard, unauthed->auth
Auth screen renders login + register forms
Login returns JWT, stores in session
Register creates user, auto-logs in
Tier badge displays correctly
checkpoints.deliverable: Working auth flow gating all other screens
blockers: Depends on CP-S2 auth endpoint being VERIFIED

checkpoints.name: Builder Screen (UI Layer 2 — THE product)
criteria: Builder screen renders with text input + tier selector
Submit calls /leading-light/evaluate/text
Result renders: grade, risk, legs, correlation, DNA verdict, sherlock
Response shape matches 09-ui-schematics.md Section 2.5 exactly
Tier gate shows upgrade prompt for locked features
Evaluation saved to history
checkpoints.deliverable: Core product screen — user can evaluate a parlay
checkpoints.gateRule: This is the product. If we stop here, we have something useful.

checkpoints.name: Dashboard + History (UI Layer 3)
criteria: Dashboard shows stats row, recent evaluations, active bets
History shows paginated evaluation list with filters
Evaluation card component shared between dashboard and history
Click evaluation -> re-opens in builder
checkpoints.deliverable: User can see their evaluation history and stats
blockers: Depends on CP-S5 (builder must exist to generate history)

checkpoints.name: Browse Screen (UI Layer 4)
criteria: ODDS_API_KEY confirmed configured on VPS
Browse shows real games with real odds (not mock)
Sport filter works
Add-to-builder flow works (game legs pre-fill builder)
Fallback: if odds unavailable, show clear 'no live data' state
checkpoints.deliverable: Browse real games with live odds
blockers: Depends on CP-S5 (builder to receive selected games)

checkpoints.name: Protocol Engine in Pipeline
criteria: Pipeline stage 17 (protocol_engine) returns real data
Protocol registry loads all 13 protocols
At least fatigue_b2b, pace_shock, lineup_instability execute with real game data
Protocol artifacts pass DNA validator
Evaluation response includes triggeredProtocols array
Marvin PDC schema aligned with BetApp registry (Option B from 10-integration-plumbing.md)
checkpoints.deliverable: Protocol engine integrated into evaluation pipeline
blockers: BetApp pipeline stage 17 status UNKNOWN — must verify first

checkpoints.name: Protocol View Screen (UI Layer 5)
criteria: Protocol screen renders per 09-ui-schematics.md Section 2.7
Shows triggered protocols with evidence, impact, explanation
Shows aggregate impact (stability modifier, fragility delta)
DNA mode toggle (CORE_ONLY vs CORE_PLUS_PROTOCOLS)
Tier gate: PRO sees 9 protocols, ELITE sees all 13
Protocol badge component reusable in builder result
blockers: Depends on CP-S8 (protocol engine must return real data)

checkpoints.name: Notifications + Onboarding + Polish (UI Layers 6-7)
criteria: Notification panel slides out with real alerts
Onboarding flow for first-visit users
Sherlock explanations use user preference (risk profile)
All 10 screens pass Playwright e2e
No placeholder data anywhere

buildPhilosophy.rule1: No screen without a verified endpoint
buildPhilosophy.rule2: No WORKING label without a curl proof
buildPhilosophy.rule4: Builder (S5) is the product — everything else is supporting
buildPhilosophy.rule5: Protocol UI (S9) is blocked until protocol engine returns real data (S8)
buildPhilosophy.rule6: Sand to studs — verify foundation before adding floors
